summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CSPM tool - all backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly. Tested 7 backend endpoints and full UI workflow including navigation, scanning, filtering, and data visualization.
passed_tests: GET /api/rules returns 22 rules with all required fields
POST /api/scan with region parameter returns complete scan results
Dashboard page displays metrics cards, charts, and top findings table
Run Scan page region selector, scan button, progress bar, and results display
Findings page filterable table with search, severity filter, service filter, sortable columns, expandable rows
Risk Overview page severity chart, service chart, score distribution, top 10 findings table
Export page JSON and CSV export buttons
Sidebar navigation works for all 5 nav items
Scan functionality with progress tracking and results display
All filtering and search capabilities in findings page
Row expansion in findings table showing detailed information
Charts and visualizations rendering correctly across all pages
